case_title: MAMED, MELANIE VS WALLINGFORD, RENA C/O GEORGE PEABODY ELEMENTARY

docket_entries.description: CONTINUANCE REQUESTED DENIED, JANUARY 8TH DATE STANDS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAMED, MELANIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WALLINGFORD, RENA  C/O GEORGE PEABODY ELEMENTARY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-27-2001, OFF CALENDAR
TRIAL RESET TO JAN-08-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
CORRESPONDANCE FROM R. WALLINGFORD REQUESTING FORA CONTINUENCE. FILE SUBMITTED FOR APPROVAL.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAMED, MELANIE HEARING SET FOR JAN-29-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAMED, MELANIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WALLINGFORD, RENA  C/O GEORGE PEABODY ELEMENTARY $200.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $220.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WALLINGFORD, RENA  C/O GEORGE PEABODY ELEMENTARY
DEFT'S REQUEST TO CHANGE TIME OF HEARING FROM 10:00 AM TO 5:30 PM, DENIED W/O PREJUDICE. NO NOTICE TO PLTF.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JAN-29-2002, GRANTED
COPIES OF DENIAL SENT TO PARTIES.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $550.00 FILED BY MAMED, MELANIE AS TO DEFENDANT WALLINGFORD, RENA  C/O GEORGE PEABODY ELEMENTARY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-27-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DEFENDANT REQUEST FOR CHANGE THE TIME OF HEARING TO 5;30 PM. SENT PAPAER TO JUDGE TO BE SIGNED.
